<?php

namespace App\Third\Jobs;

use App\Jobs\MyJob;
use App\Third\Service\Base\ApiService;
use DateTime;
use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\ShouldQueue;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class DisableApiTableAccount extends MyJob implements ShouldQueue
{
    public int $tries = 3;

    public int $timeout = 60;

    public bool $failOnTimeout = true;

    private array $apitableUsers;

    private array $xapitableUsers;

    public function __construct(array $apitableUsers, array $xapitableUsers)
    {
        $this->apitableUsers = $apitableUsers;
        $this->xapitableUsers = $xapitableUsers;
    }

    public function handle(): void
    {
        Log::info('DisableApiTableAccount');
        Log::info('apitable users', [$this->apitableUsers, $this->xapitableUsers]);
        foreach ($this->apitableUsers as $apitableUser) {
            $email = $apitableUser['email'];
            $clientId = config('my_third_app.apitable.client_id');
            $res = ApiService::appWith('apitable')->sendRequest('api/v1/depart', [
                'email' => $email, 'clientId' => $clientId,
            ]);
            Log::info('apitable user', [$email, $res]);
        }

        foreach ($this->xapitableUsers as $xapitableUser) {
            $email = $xapitableUser['email'];
            $clientId = config('my_third_app.xapitable.client_id');
            $res = ApiService::appWith('xapitable')->sendRequest('api/v1/depart', [
                'email' => $email, 'clientId' => $clientId,
            ]);
            Log::info('xapitable user', [$email, $res]);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Determine the time at which the job should timeout.
     */
    public function retryUntil(): DateTime
    {
        return now()->addMinutes(10);
    }
}

namespace App\Jobs\Resignation;

use App\Jobs\MyJob;
use App\Lib\Facade\AiMasterApiLib;
use App\Models\WorkflowRequest;
use App\Workflows\Common\Registry;
use App\Workflows\States\OtherPermission\BaseOtherPermission;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
use Throwable;

class AutoCloseAiChatAccount extends MyJob
{
    protected array $sfuserIds;

    public function __construct(array $sfuserIds)
    {
        $this->sfuserIds = $sfuserIds;
    }

    public function handle(): void
    {
        foreach ($this->sfuserIds as $sfuserId) {
            $workflowRequest = WorkflowRequest::where('user_id', $sfuserId)
                ->where('process_key', Registry::AI_TOOLS)
                ->where('current_state_id', BaseOtherPermission::COMPLETED)
                ->latest()
                ->first();

            if (empty($workflowRequest)) {
                Log::info('[260327-aichat] no completed ai_access workflow found', ['sfuser_id' => $sfuserId]);
                continue;
            }

            $data = $workflowRequest->data;

            if (empty($data['applicant_nickname']) || empty($data['applicant_email'])) {
                Log::info('[260327-aichat] 数据不完整', ['sfuser_id' => $sfuserId, 'data' => $data]);
                continue;
            }

            $payload = [
                'applicant_nickname' => $data['applicant_nickname'],
                'applicant_email' => $data['applicant_email'],
                'have_permission' => false,
            ];

            try {
                $res = AiMasterApiLib::sendRequest('web-api/permission/pass', $payload);
                Log::info('[260327-aichat] 关闭ai权限成功', ['sfuser_id' => $sfuserId, 'res' => $res]);
            } catch (Throwable $e) {
                Log::error('[260327-aichat] 关闭ai权限失败', [
                    'sfuser_id' => $sfuserId,
                    'e' => $e->getMessage(),
                    'payload' => my_json_encode($payload),
                ]);
            }
        }
    }
}

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin\Resignation;

use App\Cache\ResignationCache;
use App\DailyReport\Service\RefreshDailyReportCcUsers;
use App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode;
use App\Exceptions\ServerException;
use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
use App\Jobs\Notification\SendResignationPermissionNotification;
use App\Jobs\Resignation\AutoCloseAiChatAccount;
use App\Jobs\ThirdApp\NotifyYaUserDismissed;
use App\Jobs\UpdateSfuserCache;
use App\Models\ResignationPermission;
use App\Models\ResignationPermissionSfuser;
use App\Models\Sfuser;
use App\Models\Staff;
use App\Service\Misc\SfuserNicknameMapService;
use App\Service\Misc\SfuserNotResignedHash2IdMapService;
use App\Service\NotifyNumberService;
use App\Service\ResignationService;
use App\Team\Jobs\CloseAppAccess;
use App\Third\Jobs\DisableApiTableAccount;
use Exception;
use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Arr;
use Illuminate\Support\Carbon;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class ResignationController extends Controller
{
    private $service;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->service = app(ResignationService::class);
    }

    /**
     * @apiName 【离职管理】权限负责人列表
     *
     * @return JsonResponse
     */
    public function indexResignationPermissionWhitelist(): JsonResponse
    {
        $permissionInfos = ResignationPermission::where('is_on', 1)->select(['id', 'type', 'ids'])->get()->toArray();
        $ids = collect($permissionInfos)->pluck('ids')->collapse()->unique();
        $userNicknames = SfuserNicknameMapService::app()->ids2Nicknames($ids->toArray());
        $permissionPrincipals = [];
        foreach ($permissionInfos as $permissionInfo) {
            $permissionName = ResignationPermission::USING_PERMISSION_MAP[$permissionInfo['type']];
            $nicknames = [];
            if (!empty($permissionInfo['ids']) && is_array($permissionInfo['ids'])) {
                foreach ($permissionInfo['ids'] as $id) {
                    $nicknames[] = Arr::get($userNicknames, $id, '');
                }
            }
            $permissionPrincipals[] = array_merge($permissionInfo, ['permission_name' => $permissionName], ['nicknames' => $nicknames]);
        }
        // 不在数据库中时
        $types = [];    // 已配置的permission
        if ($permissionInfos) {
            $types = collect($permissionInfos)->pluck('type')->toArray();
        }
        foreach (ResignationPermission::USING_PERMISSION_MAP as $type => $name) {
            if (!in_array($type, $types)) { // 未配置的permission
                $permissionPrincipals[] = [
                    'id' => -1,
                    'type' => $type,
                    'permission_name' => $name,
                    'ids' => [],
                    'nicknames' => [],
                ];
            }
        }
        return $this->responseJsonSuccess(['permissions' => $permissionPrincipals]);
    }

    /**
     * @apiName 【离职权限】编辑负责人名单
     *
     * @param Request $request
     * @throws \Throwable
     * @return JsonResponse
     */
    public function editResignationPermissionWhitelist(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $input = $request->only(['type', 'ids']);
        $ids = [];
        if (Arr::has($input, 'ids')) {
            $userNicknames = SfuserNicknameMapService::app()->ids2Nicknames($input['ids']);
            $ids = array_keys($userNicknames);
        }
        if (empty($ids)) {
            return $this->responseJsonFail('ids can not be empty');
        }
        if (!in_array($input['type'], array_keys(ResignationPermission::USING_PERMISSION_MAP))) {
            // 暂时只允许使用中的权限更改负责人，但现在还没有废弃的权限，也没有方案。取全部权限也无所谓。但权限是写死的，不能在前端新增。
            return $this->responseJsonFail('invalid permission');
        }
        ResignationCache::clearUserData();
        db()->beginTransaction();
        try {
            ResignationPermission::UpdateOrCreate(
                ['type' => $input['type']],
                ['ids' => $ids],
            );
            foreach ($ids as $id) {
                Staff::initEmptyRecordIfNotExists($id);
            }
            db()->commit();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            db()->rollBack();
            Log::error('failed to commit transaction', ['e' => $e->getMessage()]);
            return $this->responseJsonFail(__('my_api.db_update_fail'), ServerException::ERR_SERVER_DATABASE);
        }
        NotifyNumberService::app()->initResignationPermission();
        return $this->responseJsonSuccess(['success' => true]);
    }

    /**
     * @apiName 【离职管理】离职员工权限关闭状态列表与搜索
     *
     * @param Request $request
     * @return JsonResponse
     */
    public function searchResignationSfusers(Request $request)
    {
        // 花名查询，前端先走sfuser-ids接口，得sfuser_id。
        $input = $request->only(['sfuser_id', 'start_date', 'end_date', 'is_accomplished', 'per_page']) + ['per_page' => 20];
        $sfuserQuery = ResignationPermissionSfuser::selectRaw('sfuser_id,resignation_date,bit_and(status & 1) as is_accomplished')->groupByRaw('sfuser_id, resignation_date')->orderBy('resignation_date', 'desc');
        $sfuserQuery = $this->service->filterByInputAdmin($sfuserQuery, $input);
        $resignationSfuser = $sfuserQuery->paginate($input['per_page'])->toArray();
        $resignationSfuserData = $resignationSfuser['data'];

        $resignationSfuserDetail = ResignationPermissionSfuser::with('operationRecord:id as op_id,resignation_permission_sfusers_id,operation,operator_id,remark,system_remark,postponed_date,created_at,updated_at')
            ->get()->groupBy(['sfuser_id', 'resignation_date'])->toArray();
        $paginatedData = $this->service->dealWithResignationSfuserData($resignationSfuserDetail, $resignationSfuserData);
        return $this->responseJsonSuccess([
            'current_page' => $resignationSfuser['current_page'],
            'per_page' => $resignationSfuser['per_page'],
            'total' => $resignationSfuser['total'],
            'resignation_permission_sfusers' => $paginatedData,
        ]);
    }

    /**
     * @apiName 【离职管理】录入离职员工
     *
     * @param Request $request
     * @return JsonResponse
     */
    public function addResignationSfusers(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        // 这段代码写的有点过于复杂了，完全没必要搞这么复杂，先不动这里的逻辑，让前端传递一个额外的参数

        $input = $request->only(['sfuser_ids']);
        $ebSfusers = $request->input('eb_sfusers', []);
        $yaSfusers = $request->input('ya_sfusers', []);
        $apitableSfusers = $request->input('apitable_sfusers', []);
        $xapitableSfusers = $request->input('xapitable_sfusers', []);
        $sfuserIds = Sfuser::whereIn('id', $input['sfuser_ids'])->pluck('id')->toArray();
        $date = Carbon::now()->toDateString();
        $failedIds = [];
        $flag = false;
        // 在这里标记花名
        $ebNicknames = [];
        foreach ($ebSfusers as $ebSfuser) {
            $ebNicknames[$ebSfuser['sfuser_id']] = $ebSfuser['nickname'];
        }

        // 开启大事务
        db()->beginTransaction();
        try {
            $rpsColumns = [];
            $sfColumns = [];
            foreach ($sfuserIds as $id) {
                foreach (ResignationPermission::USING_PERMISSION_MAP as $type => $name) {
                    $item = [
                        'sfuser_id' => $id,
                        'resignation_date' => $date,
                        'type' => $type,
                        'created_at' => Carbon::now(),
                        'updated_at' => Carbon::now(),
                        'extra_info' => '{}',
                    ];
                    // eb 权限关闭，保存下来需要使用的非对称加密的花名
                    if ($type == ResignationPermission::EASTBLUE_TYPE) {
                        $extraInfo = [
                            'eb_nickname' => Arr::get($ebNicknames, $id),
                        ];
                        $item['extra_info'] = json_encode($extraInfo);
                    }
                    $rpsColumns[] = $item;
                }
            }
            ResignationPermissionSfuser::insert($rpsColumns);
            Sfuser::whereIn('id', $sfuserIds)->update(['status' => 'resignation', 'resignation_date' => $date, 'active' => 0]);
            $flag = true;
            db()->commit();
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            db()->rollBack();
            $flag = false;
            Log::error('failed to commit big transaction', [
                'location' => __CLASS__.'@'.__METHOD__.'#'.__LINE__,
                'exception_code' => $e->getCode(),
                'message' => $e->getMessage(),
            ]);
        }

        // 这代码写得未免太过抽象了。。

        // 大事务失败，换小事务一条条尝试。
        if (!$flag) {
            foreach ($sfuserIds as $sfuserId) {
                db()->beginTransaction();
                try {
                    $rpsColumns = [];
                    foreach (ResignationPermission::USING_PERMISSION_MAP as $type => $name) {
                        $item = [
                            'sfuser_id' => $sfuserId,
                            'resignation_date' => $date,
                            'type' => $type,
                            'created_at' => Carbon::now(),
                            'updated_at' => Carbon::now(),
                            'extra_info' => '{}',
                        ];

                        // eb 权限关闭，保存下来需要使用的非对称加密的花名
                        if ($type == ResignationPermission::EASTBLUE_TYPE) {
                            $extraInfo = [
                                'eb_nickname' => Arr::get($ebNicknames, $sfuserId),
                            ];
                            $item['extra_info'] = json_encode($extraInfo);
                        }

                        $rpsColumns[] = $item;
                    }
                    ResignationPermissionSfuser::insert($rpsColumns);
                    Sfuser::whereId($sfuserId)->update(['status' => 'resignation', 'resignation_date' => $date, 'active' => 0]);
                    db()->commit();
                } catch (Exception $e) {
                    db()->rollBack();
                    $failedIds[] = $sfuserId;
                    Log::error('failed to commit transaction', [
                        'location' => __CLASS__.'@'.__METHOD__.'#'.__LINE__,
                        'exception_code' => $e->getCode(),
                        'message' => $e->getMessage(),
                    ]);
                }
            }
        }
        $successIds = array_diff($sfuserIds, $failedIds);

        // 刷新离职缓存
        RefreshDailyReportCcUsers::app()->addDismissedSfusers($successIds);
        SfuserNotResignedHash2IdMapService::app()->refreshAll(time() - 60);

        $num = count($successIds);
        if ($num > 0) {
            $this->service->sendAdministratorsEmail($successIds);
        }

        $invalidIds = array_diff($input['sfuser_ids'], $sfuserIds);
        $notificationType = ResignationPermissionSfuser::NOTIFICATION_NOW;
        if (!app()->environment(['unit_test', 'testing'])) {
            register_shutdown_function(function () use ($notificationType, $num, $date) {
                dispatch(new SendResignationPermissionNotification($notificationType, $num, $date));
            });
        } else {
            dispatch(new SendResignationPermissionNotification($notificationType, $num, $date));
        }
        $message = '';  // 错误消息
        if ($failedIds) {
            // return $this->responseJsonSuccess(['failed_sfuser_ids' => $failedIds, 'msg' => 'duplicate id.']);
            $message = $message.'duplicate id:'.implode(',', $failedIds).'.';
        }
        if ($invalidIds) {  // 可以认为该情况不存在
            // return $this->responseJsonSuccess(['failed_sfuser_ids' => $failedIds, 'msg' => 'non-existent id.']);
            Log::error('invalid id.', ['location' => __CLASS__.'@'.__METHOD__.'#'.__LINE__, 'ids' => $failedIds]);
            $message = $message.'non-existent id:'.implode(',', $failedIds).'.';
        }
        if ($message) {
            return $this->responseJsonFail($message, ExceptionCode::ERR_COMMON_INVALID_ARGUMENTS);
        }
        $IdToUsingPermissionMap = $this->service->getIdToUsingPermissionMap();
        foreach ($IdToUsingPermissionMap as $sfuserId => $permissions) {
            NotifyNumberService::app()->modifyIndividual($sfuserId, 'resignation_permission_to_be_executed', $num * count($permissions));

        // dispatch apitable resignation process
        DisableApiTableAccount::dispatch($apitableSfusers, $xapitableSfusers);

namespace App\Team\Jobs;

use App\Jobs\MyJob;
use App\Lib\Facade\AiMasterApiLib;
use App\Models\WorkflowRequest;
use App\Workflows\States\OtherPermission\BaseOtherPermission;
use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\ShouldQueue;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class CreateAiFromWorkflow extends MyJob implements ShouldQueue
{
    private int $workflowId;

    public function __construct(int $workflowId)
    {
        $this->workflowId = $workflowId;
    }

    public function handle(): void
    {
        $workflowRequest = WorkflowRequest::find($this->workflowId);
        if (empty($workflowRequest)) {
            Log::info('workflowRequest not found', [$this->workflowId]);
            return;
        }

        if ($workflowRequest->current_state_id != BaseOtherPermission::COMPLETED) {
            Log::info('workflowRequest not completed', [$this->workflowId]);
            return;
        }
        $data = $workflowRequest->data;

        if (empty($data['applicant_nickname']) || empty($data['applicant_email'])) {
            Log::info('数据不完整', ['data' => $data]);
            return;
        }

        $payload = [
            'applicant_nickname' => $data['applicant_nickname'],
            'applicant_email' => $data['applicant_email'],
            'have_permission' => true,
        ];
        try {
            $res = AiMasterApiLib::sendRequest('web-api/permission/pass', $payload);
            Log::info('开通ai 权限成功 '.my_json_encode($payload).my_json_encode($res));
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            info($e->getTraceAsString());
            Log::error('开通ai 权限失败', ['e' => $e->getMessage(), 'wr' => my_json_encode($workflowRequest), 'payload' => my_json_encode($payload)]);
        }
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Jobs\Resignation;

use App\Jobs\MyJob;
use App\Lib\Facade\AiMasterApiLib;
use App\Models\Sfuser;
use App\Models\WorkflowRequest;
use App\Workflows\Common\Registry;
use App\Workflows\States\OtherPermission\BaseOtherPermission;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
use Throwable;

class AutoCloseAiChatAccount extends MyJob
{
    protected array $sfuserIds;

    public function __construct(array $sfuserIds)
    {
        $this->sfuserIds = $sfuserIds;
    }

    public function handle(): void
    {
        foreach ($this->sfuserIds as $sfuserId) {
            $payload = $this->resolvePayload($sfuserId);

            if (empty($payload)) {
                continue;
            }

            try {
                $res = AiMasterApiLib::sendRequest('web-api/permission/pass', $payload);
                Log::info('[260327-aichat] 关闭ai权限成功', ['sfuser_id' => $sfuserId, 'res' => $res]);
            } catch (Throwable $e) {
                Log::error('[260327-aichat] 关闭ai权限失败', [
                    'sfuser_id' => $sfuserId,
                    'e' => $e->getMessage(),
                    'payload' => my_json_encode($payload),
                ]);
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * 优先从审批流程获取 nickname/email，没有审批记录则从 sfuser 表获取
     */
    private function resolvePayload(int $sfuserId): ?array
    {
        $workflowRequest = WorkflowRequest::where('user_id', $sfuserId)
            ->where('process_key', Registry::AI_TOOLS)
            ->where('current_state_id', BaseOtherPermission::COMPLETED)
            ->latest()
            ->first();

        if (!empty($workflowRequest)) {
            $data = $workflowRequest->data;
            if (!empty($data['applicant_nickname']) && !empty($data['applicant_email'])) {
                return [
                    'applicant_nickname' => $data['applicant_nickname'],
                    'applicant_email' => $data['applicant_email'],
                    'have_permission' => false,
                ];
            }
        }

        // 无审批记录或审批数据不完整，从 sfuser 表获取
        $sfuser = Sfuser::find($sfuserId);
        if (empty($sfuser) || empty($sfuser->nickname) || empty($sfuser->email)) {
            Log::info('[260327-aichat] 无法获取用户信息', ['sfuser_id' => $sfuserId]);
            return null;
        }

        Log::info('[260327-aichat] 使用sfuser表信息关闭ai权限', ['sfuser_id' => $sfuserId]);

        return [
            'applicant_nickname' => $sfuser->nickname,
            'applicant_email' => $sfuser->email,
            'have_permission' => false,
        ];
    }
}

content.text:
这句话是你同事给的方案建议，意思是：

## 拆解一下

### 1. "类似于关闭 apitable 账号那样"

看 `DisableApiTableAccount.php` 的模式：
- 前端录入离职员工时，**前端把 apitable 相关信息加密后传给后端**（`apitable_sfusers`、`xapitable_sfusers` 参数）
- 后端拿到后调用 apitable 的 API 关闭账号

对应 `ResignationController.php:161-162`：
```php
$apitableSfusers = $request->input('apitable_sfusers', []);
$xapitableSfusers = $request->input('xapitable_sfusers', []);
```

### 2. "用 ai chat 那边的 key 前端非对称加密一下"

看前端已经有这些文件：
- `oa-frontend/src/store/encrypt/apitablePublicKey.ts` — apitable 的公钥
- `oa-frontend/src/store/encrypt/xapitablePublicKey.ts` — xapitable 的公钥
- `oa-frontend/src/store/encrypt/encrypt.ts` — 加密逻辑

意思是 AI Chat 那边也提供一个**公钥**，前端用这个公钥对用户信息做非对称加密，传到 AI Chat 的 API，AI Chat 用自己的私钥解密后执行删除。这样敏感信息（email/nickname）在传输过程中是加密的。

### 3. 但实际上——

**现有代码已经不是这么做的。** 看 `AutoCloseAiChatAccount.php`，它走的是 `AiMasterApiLib::sendRequest()`，这是**后端对后端**的签名通信（类似 oa-server → oa-core 的 API Secret 签名机制），不经过前端加密。

你同事说的是一种方案思路，但实际实现走的是另一条路——后端直接调 AI Chat 的 `web-api/permission/pass` 接口，用服务端签名保证安全，**不需要前端参与加密**。

<?php

namespace App\Service\Misc;

use App\Exceptions\ServerException;
use App\Models\Sfuser;
use App\Service\Traits\TService;
use Redis;

class SfuserNicknameMapService
{
    use TService;

    public const REDIS_KEY = 'COMMON:SFUSER_ID2NICKNAME_MAP';

    private mixed $redis;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->redis = redis('shared');
    }

    /**
     * @throws \RedisException
     * @return false|int|\Redis
     */
    public function clear(): bool|int|Redis
    {
        // 只有中国站点可以清理掉共享缓存
        if (SiteService::app()->is(SiteService::CHN)) {
            return $this->redis->del(static::REDIS_KEY);
        }

        return false;
    }

    /**
     * 刷新当前缓存，注意我们没有 clean，clean 的话可能错误地清理了其他地区的数据。
     *
     * @param int $updatedAfter
     * @throws \RedisException
     * @return void
     */
    public function refreshAll(int $updatedAfter = 0): void
    {
        $updatedAfterDateTime = date('Y-m-d H:i:s', $updatedAfter);
        $id2Nickname = Sfuser::where('updated_at', '>=', $updatedAfterDateTime)
            ->where('is_closed', 0)
            ->pluck('nickname', 'id')
            ->toArray();
        // 避免不存在数据时一直创建缓存
        $id2Nickname[0] = '';

        $this->redis->hMSet(static::REDIS_KEY, $id2Nickname);
    }

    /**
     * 刷新单个人的花名缓存，注意清理掉旧的花名。
     *
     * @param int $sfuserId
     * @param string $nickname
     * @throws \RedisException
     * @return void
     */
    public function refreshOne(int $sfuserId, string $nickname): void
    {
        $this->redis->hSet(static::REDIS_KEY, $sfuserId, $nickname);
    }

    /**
     * @param array $ids
     * @throws \App\Exceptions\ServerException
     * @throws \RedisException
     * @return array
     */
    public function ids2Nicknames(array $ids): array
    {
        $ids = array_unique($ids);
        if (!$this->redis->exists(static::REDIS_KEY)) {
            $this->refreshAll();
        }

        if (empty($ids)) {
            return [];
        }

        $nicknames = $this->redis->hMGet(static::REDIS_KEY, $ids);

        foreach ($nicknames as $k => $nickname) {
            // convert false to empty string
            if ($nickname === false) {
                $nicknames[$k] = '';
            }
        }

        if (count($ids) != count($nicknames)) {
            throw new ServerException('failed to fetch nicknames via sfuser ids');
        }

        return array_combine($ids, $nicknames);
    }

    public function map(): array
    {
        return $this->redis->hGetAll(static::REDIS_KEY);
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Team\Jobs;

use App\Jobs\MyJob;
use App\Lib\Facade\AiMasterApiLib;
use App\Models\WorkflowRequest;
use App\Workflows\States\OtherPermission\BaseOtherPermission;
use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\ShouldQueue;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class CreateAiFromWorkflow extends MyJob implements ShouldQueue
{
    private int $workflowId;

    public function __construct(int $workflowId)
    {
        $this->workflowId = $workflowId;
    }

    public function handle(): void
    {
        $workflowRequest = WorkflowRequest::find($this->workflowId);
        if (empty($workflowRequest)) {
            Log::info('workflowRequest not found', [$this->workflowId]);
            return;
        }

        if ($workflowRequest->current_state_id != BaseOtherPermission::COMPLETED) {
            Log::info('workflowRequest not completed', [$this->workflowId]);
            return;
        }
        $data = $workflowRequest->data;

        if (empty($data['applicant_nickname']) || empty($data['applicant_email'])) {
            Log::info('数据不完整', ['data' => $data]);
            return;
        }

        $payload = [
            'applicant_nickname' => $data['applicant_nickname'],
            'applicant_email' => $data['applicant_email'],
            'have_permission' => true,
        ];
        try {
            $res = AiMasterApiLib::sendRequest('web-api/permission/pass', $payload);
            Log::info('开通ai 权限成功 '.my_json_encode($payload).my_json_encode($res));
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            info($e->getTraceAsString());
            Log::error('开通ai 权限失败', ['e' => $e->getMessage(), 'wr' => my_json_encode($workflowRequest), 'payload' => my_json_encode($payload)]);
        }
    }
}

好嘞，看到了！只有 id=4066 的记录有 `applicant_nickname` 和 `applicant_email`，其他的都没有。说明这俩字段是**后来前端改版后才加的**，老的审批记录没有。

让我看看 id=4066 里这俩字段存的是明文还是密文。

input.sql: SELECT id, user_id, JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.applicant_nickname') as nick, JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.applicant_email') as email, current_state_id FROM workflow_requests WHERE id = 4066

content.text: Query execution time: 40.77 ms

**操！果然是加密的！** 这俩字段存的就是前端用 AI Chat 的公钥做非对称加密后的密文。

这下你同事的话完全说通了：

1. **前端录入离职员工时**，拿 AI Chat 那边的公钥对 nickname/email 做非对称加密
2. **加密后的值存到 workflow_requests.data 里**
3. **后端调 AI Chat 接口时**，把密文直接传过去，AI Chat 用自己的私钥解密

所以 `applicant_nickname` 和 `applicant_email` 传的**本来就是密文**，AI Chat 那边自己解密。这不是传明文！

那我刚才的改动就有问题了——从 sfusers 表取的 nickname/email 也是加密的，但那是 **OA 的对称加密**，不是 AI Chat 的非对称加密，AI Chat 那边解不了。

**正确方案应该是：** 离职录入的前端页面，跟 apitable 一样，用 AI Chat 的公钥把用户信息加密后传给后端，后端再透传给 AI Chat。

让我看看前端离职录入的代码和现有的 apitable 加密逻辑。

现在完全清楚了！看 `addResignationStaffAPI`（第 284-337 行）：

前端录入离职员工时，已经在对各个第三方服务做非对称加密：
- **eb**: `keyEncrypt(nickName, ebPublicKey)` 
- **ya**: `keyEncryptYa(email)`
- **apitable**: `keyEncrypt(email, apitablePublicKey)`
- **xapitable**: `keyEncrypt(email, xapiTablePublicKey)`

**但是没有 AI Chat 的！** 需要加上用 AI Chat 公钥加密的参数。

现在梳理完整方案：

## 影响范围

| 层 | 文件 | 改动 |
|---|---|---|
| 前端 | `src/store/encrypt/aichatPublicKey.ts` | **新建** — AI Chat 公钥文件 |

现在的 `AutoCloseAiChatAccount` 接收的是 sfuser_id 数组，然后自己去查 DB 拿 nickname/email（加密的密文），这条路走不通。

**正确做法：** 跟 `DisableApiTableAccount` 一样，前端传加密好的数据过来，后端直接透传给 AI Chat。

所以 `AutoCloseAiChatAccount` **不需要删掉，需要改造**：
- 改成接收前端传来的 `aichat_sfusers`（里面已经是 AI Chat 公钥加密过的 nickname/email）
- 直接透传给 AI Chat 接口

<?php

namespace App\Third\Jobs;

use App\Jobs\MyJob;
use App\Third\Service\Base\ApiService;
use DateTime;
use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\ShouldQueue;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class DisableApiTableAccount extends MyJob implements ShouldQueue
{
    public int $tries = 3;

    public int $timeout = 60;

    public bool $failOnTimeout = true;

    private array $apitableUsers;

    private array $xapitableUsers;

    public function __construct(array $apitableUsers, array $xapitableUsers)
    {
        $this->apitableUsers = $apitableUsers;
        $this->xapitableUsers = $xapitableUsers;
    }

    public function handle(): void
    {
        Log::info('DisableApiTableAccount');
        Log::info('apitable users', [$this->apitableUsers, $this->xapitableUsers]);
        foreach ($this->apitableUsers as $apitableUser) {
            $email = $apitableUser['email'];
            $clientId = config('my_third_app.apitable.client_id');
            $res = ApiService::appWith('apitable')->sendRequest('api/v1/depart', [
                'email' => $email, 'clientId' => $clientId,
            ]);
            Log::info('apitable user', [$email, $res]);
        }

        foreach ($this->xapitableUsers as $xapitableUser) {
            $email = $xapitableUser['email'];
            $clientId = config('my_third_app.xapitable.client_id');
            $res = ApiService::appWith('xapitable')->sendRequest('api/v1/depart', [
                'email' => $email, 'clientId' => $clientId,
            ]);
            Log::info('xapitable user', [$email, $res]);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Determine the time at which the job should timeout.
     */
    public function retryUntil(): DateTime
    {
        return now()->addMinutes(10);
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Jobs\Resignation;

use App\Jobs\MyJob;
use App\Lib\Facade\AiMasterApiLib;
use App\Models\WorkflowRequest;
use App\Workflows\Common\Registry;
use App\Workflows\States\OtherPermission\BaseOtherPermission;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
use Throwable;

class AutoCloseAiChatAccount extends MyJob
{
    protected array $sfuserIds;

    public function __construct(array $sfuserIds)
    {
        $this->sfuserIds = $sfuserIds;
    }

    public function handle(): void
    {
        foreach ($this->sfuserIds as $sfuserId) {
            $workflowRequest = WorkflowRequest::where('user_id', $sfuserId)
                ->where('process_key', Registry::AI_TOOLS)
                ->where('current_state_id', BaseOtherPermission::COMPLETED)
                ->latest()
                ->first();

            if (empty($workflowRequest)) {
                Log::info('[260327-aichat] no completed ai_access workflow found', ['sfuser_id' => $sfuserId]);
                continue;
            }

            $data = $workflowRequest->data;

            if (empty($data['applicant_nickname']) || empty($data['applicant_email'])) {
                Log::info('[260327-aichat] 数据不完整', ['sfuser_id' => $sfuserId, 'data' => $data]);
                continue;
            }

            $payload = [
                'applicant_nickname' => $data['applicant_nickname'],
                'applicant_email' => $data['applicant_email'],
                'have_permission' => false,
            ];

            try {
                $res = AiMasterApiLib::sendRequest('web-api/permission/pass', $payload);
                Log::info('[260327-aichat] 关闭ai权限成功', ['sfuser_id' => $sfuserId, 'res' => $res]);
            } catch (Throwable $e) {
                Log::error('[260327-aichat] 关闭ai权限失败', [
                    'sfuser_id' => $sfuserId,
                    'e' => $e->getMessage(),
                    'payload' => my_json_encode($payload),
                ]);
            }
        }
    }
}

## `AutoCloseAiChatAccount` 需要改，不是删

**现在的问题：** 它从 `workflow_requests` 表查审批记录拿 `applicant_nickname` / `applicant_email`，但：
1. 不是所有用户都有审批记录（早期是直接导入的）
2. 即使有审批记录，老的记录也没有这俩字段

**改造方案：** 跟 `DisableApiTableAccount` 一模一样的模式：

| 改动 | 说明 |
|---|---|
| **构造函数** | 改成接收 `array $aichatSfusers`（前端传来的加密数据） |
| **handle()** | 遍历 `$aichatSfusers`，每个元素有 `nickname` 和 `email`（已被 AI Chat 公钥加密），直接透传给 AI Chat 接口 |
| **ResignationController 298 行** | 改成 `AutoCloseAiChatAccount::dispatch($aichatSfusers)` |
| **前端 addResignationStaffAPI** | 加上 `aichat_sfusers` 参数，用 `aiPublicKey` 加密 |

**这样不管用户有没有审批记录，都能正常删除 AI Chat 账号。** 因为加密数据来自前端当前查到的明文用户信息，跟历史审批流程完全无关。

<?php

namespace App\Jobs\Resignation;

use App\Jobs\MyJob;
use App\Lib\Facade\AiMasterApiLib;
use DateTime;
use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\ShouldQueue;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
use Throwable;

class AutoCloseAiChatAccount extends MyJob implements ShouldQueue
{
    public int $tries = 3;

    public int $timeout = 60;

    public bool $failOnTimeout = true;

    /** @var array<array{sfuser_id: int, nickname: string, email: string}> */
    private array $aichatSfusers;

    public function __construct(array $aichatSfusers)
    {
        $this->aichatSfusers = $aichatSfusers;
    }

    public function handle(): void
    {
        foreach ($this->aichatSfusers as $aichatSfuser) {
            $sfuserId = $aichatSfuser['sfuser_id'] ?? 0;
            $nickname = $aichatSfuser['nickname'] ?? '';
            $email = $aichatSfuser['email'] ?? '';

            if (empty($nickname) || empty($email)) {
                Log::info('[AutoCloseAiChat] 数据不完整，跳过', ['sfuser_id' => $sfuserId]);
                continue;
            }

            $payload = [
                'applicant_nickname' => $nickname,
                'applicant_email' => $email,
                'have_permission' => false,
            ];

            try {
                $res = AiMasterApiLib::sendRequest('web-api/permission/pass', $payload);
                Log::info('[AutoCloseAiChat] 关闭ai权限成功', ['sfuser_id' => $sfuserId, 'res' => $res]);
            } catch (Throwable $e) {
                Log::error('[AutoCloseAiChat] 关闭ai权限失败', [
                    'sfuser_id' => $sfuserId,
                    'e' => $e->getMessage(),
                ]);
            }
        }
    }

    public function retryUntil(): DateTime
    {
        return now()->addMinutes(10);
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Jobs\Resignation;

use App\Jobs\MyJob;
use App\Lib\Facade\AiMasterApiLib;
use App\Models\WorkflowRequest;
use App\Workflows\Common\Registry;
use App\Workflows\States\OtherPermission\BaseOtherPermission;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
use Throwable;

class AutoCloseAiChatAccount extends MyJob
{
    protected array $sfuserIds;

    public function __construct(array $sfuserIds)
    {
        $this->sfuserIds = $sfuserIds;
    }

    public function handle(): void
    {
        foreach ($this->sfuserIds as $sfuserId) {
            $workflowRequest = WorkflowRequest::where('user_id', $sfuserId)
                ->where('process_key', Registry::AI_TOOLS)
                ->where('current_state_id', BaseOtherPermission::COMPLETED)
                ->latest()
                ->first();

            if (empty($workflowRequest)) {
                Log::info('[260327-aichat] no completed ai_access workflow found', ['sfuser_id' => $sfuserId]);
                continue;
            }

            $data = $workflowRequest->data;

            if (empty($data['applicant_nickname']) || empty($data['applicant_email'])) {
                Log::info('[260327-aichat] 数据不完整', ['sfuser_id' => $sfuserId, 'data' => $data]);
                continue;
            }

            $payload = [
                'applicant_nickname' => $data['applicant_nickname'],
                'applicant_email' => $data['applicant_email'],
                'have_permission' => false,
            ];

            try {
                $res = AiMasterApiLib::sendRequest('web-api/permission/pass', $payload);
                Log::info('[260327-aichat] 关闭ai权限成功', ['sfuser_id' => $sfuserId, 'res' => $res]);
            } catch (Throwable $e) {
                Log::error('[260327-aichat] 关闭ai权限失败', [
                    'sfuser_id' => $sfuserId,
                    'e' => $e->getMessage(),
                    'payload' => my_json_encode($payload),
                ]);
            }
        }
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin\Resignation;

use App\Cache\ResignationCache;
use App\DailyReport\Service\RefreshDailyReportCcUsers;
use App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode;
use App\Exceptions\ServerException;
use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
use App\Jobs\Notification\SendResignationPermissionNotification;
use App\Jobs\Resignation\AutoCloseAiChatAccount;
use App\Jobs\ThirdApp\NotifyYaUserDismissed;
use App\Jobs\UpdateSfuserCache;
use App\Models\ResignationPermission;
use App\Models\ResignationPermissionSfuser;
use App\Models\Sfuser;
use App\Models\Staff;
use App\Service\Misc\SfuserNicknameMapService;
use App\Service\Misc\SfuserNotResignedHash2IdMapService;
use App\Service\NotifyNumberService;
use App\Service\ResignationService;
use App\Team\Jobs\CloseAppAccess;
use App\Third\Jobs\DisableApiTableAccount;
use Exception;
use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Arr;
use Illuminate\Support\Carbon;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class ResignationController extends Controller
{
    private $service;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->service = app(ResignationService::class);
    }

    /**
     * @apiName 【离职管理】权限负责人列表
     *
     * @return JsonResponse
     */
    public function indexResignationPermissionWhitelist(): JsonResponse
    {
        $permissionInfos = ResignationPermission::where('is_on', 1)->select(['id', 'type', 'ids'])->get()->toArray();
        $ids = collect($permissionInfos)->pluck('ids')->collapse()->unique();
        $userNicknames = SfuserNicknameMapService::app()->ids2Nicknames($ids->toArray());
        $permissionPrincipals = [];
        foreach ($permissionInfos as $permissionInfo) {
            $permissionName = ResignationPermission::USING_PERMISSION_MAP[$permissionInfo['type']];
            $nicknames = [];
            if (!empty($permissionInfo['ids']) && is_array($permissionInfo['ids'])) {
                foreach ($permissionInfo['ids'] as $id) {
                    $nicknames[] = Arr::get($userNicknames, $id, '');
                }
            }
            $permissionPrincipals[] = array_merge($permissionInfo, ['permission_name' => $permissionName], ['nicknames' => $nicknames]);
        }
        // 不在数据库中时
        $types = [];    // 已配置的permission
        if ($permissionInfos) {
            $types = collect($permissionInfos)->pluck('type')->toArray();
        }
        foreach (ResignationPermission::USING_PERMISSION_MAP as $type => $name) {
            if (!in_array($type, $types)) { // 未配置的permission
                $permissionPrincipals[] = [
                    'id' => -1,
                    'type' => $type,
                    'permission_name' => $name,
                    'ids' => [],
                    'nicknames' => [],
                ];
            }
        }
        return $this->responseJsonSuccess(['permissions' => $permissionPrincipals]);
    }

    /**
     * @apiName 【离职权限】编辑负责人名单
     *
     * @param Request $request
     * @throws \Throwable
     * @return JsonResponse
     */
    public function editResignationPermissionWhitelist(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $input = $request->only(['type', 'ids']);
        $ids = [];
        if (Arr::has($input, 'ids')) {
            $userNicknames = SfuserNicknameMapService::app()->ids2Nicknames($input['ids']);
            $ids = array_keys($userNicknames);
        }
        if (empty($ids)) {
            return $this->responseJsonFail('ids can not be empty');
        }
        if (!in_array($input['type'], array_keys(ResignationPermission::USING_PERMISSION_MAP))) {
            // 暂时只允许使用中的权限更改负责人，但现在还没有废弃的权限，也没有方案。取全部权限也无所谓。但权限是写死的，不能在前端新增。
            return $this->responseJsonFail('invalid permission');
        }
        ResignationCache::clearUserData();
        db()->beginTransaction();
        try {
            ResignationPermission::UpdateOrCreate(
                ['type' => $input['type']],
                ['ids' => $ids],
            );
            foreach ($ids as $id) {
                Staff::initEmptyRecordIfNotExists($id);
            }
            db()->commit();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            db()->rollBack();
            Log::error('failed to commit transaction', ['e' => $e->getMessage()]);
            return $this->responseJsonFail(__('my_api.db_update_fail'), ServerException::ERR_SERVER_DATABASE);
        }
        NotifyNumberService::app()->initResignationPermission();
        return $this->responseJsonSuccess(['success' => true]);
    }

    /**
     * @apiName 【离职管理】离职员工权限关闭状态列表与搜索
     *
     * @param Request $request
     * @return JsonResponse
     */
    public function searchResignationSfusers(Request $request)
    {
        // 花名查询，前端先走sfuser-ids接口，得sfuser_id。
        $input = $request->only(['sfuser_id', 'start_date', 'end_date', 'is_accomplished', 'per_page']) + ['per_page' => 20];
        $sfuserQuery = ResignationPermissionSfuser::selectRaw('sfuser_id,resignation_date,bit_and(status & 1) as is_accomplished')->groupByRaw('sfuser_id, resignation_date')->orderBy('resignation_date', 'desc');
        $sfuserQuery = $this->service->filterByInputAdmin($sfuserQuery, $input);
        $resignationSfuser = $sfuserQuery->paginate($input['per_page'])->toArray();
        $resignationSfuserData = $resignationSfuser['data'];

        $resignationSfuserDetail = ResignationPermissionSfuser::with('operationRecord:id as op_id,resignation_permission_sfusers_id,operation,operator_id,remark,system_remark,postponed_date,created_at,updated_at')
            ->get()->groupBy(['sfuser_id', 'resignation_date'])->toArray();
        $paginatedData = $this->service->dealWithResignationSfuserData($resignationSfuserDetail, $resignationSfuserData);
        return $this->responseJsonSuccess([
            'current_page' => $resignationSfuser['current_page'],
            'per_page' => $resignationSfuser['per_page'],
            'total' => $resignationSfuser['total'],
            'resignation_permission_sfusers' => $paginatedData,
        ]);
    }

    /**
     * @apiName 【离职管理】录入离职员工
     *
     * @param Request $request
     * @return JsonResponse
     */
    public function addResignationSfusers(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        // 这段代码写的有点过于复杂了，完全没必要搞这么复杂，先不动这里的逻辑，让前端传递一个额外的参数

        $input = $request->only(['sfuser_ids']);
        $ebSfusers = $request->input('eb_sfusers', []);
        $yaSfusers = $request->input('ya_sfusers', []);
        $apitableSfusers = $request->input('apitable_sfusers', []);
        $xapitableSfusers = $request->input('xapitable_sfusers', []);
        $sfuserIds = Sfuser::whereIn('id', $input['sfuser_ids'])->pluck('id')->toArray();
        $date = Carbon::now()->toDateString();
        $failedIds = [];
        $flag = false;
        // 在这里标记花名
        $ebNicknames = [];
        foreach ($ebSfusers as $ebSfuser) {
            $ebNicknames[$ebSfuser['sfuser_id']] = $ebSfuser['nickname'];
        }

        // 开启大事务
        db()->beginTransaction();
        try {
            $rpsColumns = [];
            $sfColumns = [];
            foreach ($sfuserIds as $id) {
                foreach (ResignationPermission::USING_PERMISSION_MAP as $type => $name) {
                    $item = [
                        'sfuser_id' => $id,
                        'resignation_date' => $date,
                        'type' => $type,
                        'created_at' => Carbon::now(),
                        'updated_at' => Carbon::now(),
                        'extra_info' => '{}',
                    ];
                    // eb 权限关闭，保存下来需要使用的非对称加密的花名
                    if ($type == ResignationPermission::EASTBLUE_TYPE) {
                        $extraInfo = [
                            'eb_nickname' => Arr::get($ebNicknames, $id),
                        ];
                        $item['extra_info'] = json_encode($extraInfo);
                    }
                    $rpsColumns[] = $item;
                }
            }
            ResignationPermissionSfuser::insert($rpsColumns);
            Sfuser::whereIn('id', $sfuserIds)->update(['status' => 'resignation', 'resignation_date' => $date, 'active' => 0]);
            $flag = true;
            db()->commit();
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            db()->rollBack();
            $flag = false;
            Log::error('failed to commit big transaction', [
                'location' => __CLASS__.'@'.__METHOD__.'#'.__LINE__,
                'exception_code' => $e->getCode(),
                'message' => $e->getMessage(),
            ]);
        }

        // 这代码写得未免太过抽象了。。

        // 大事务失败，换小事务一条条尝试。
        if (!$flag) {
            foreach ($sfuserIds as $sfuserId) {
                db()->beginTransaction();
                try {
                    $rpsColumns = [];
                    foreach (ResignationPermission::USING_PERMISSION_MAP as $type => $name) {
                        $item = [
                            'sfuser_id' => $sfuserId,
                            'resignation_date' => $date,
                            'type' => $type,
                            'created_at' => Carbon::now(),
                            'updated_at' => Carbon::now(),
                            'extra_info' => '{}',
                        ];

                        // eb 权限关闭，保存下来需要使用的非对称加密的花名
                        if ($type == ResignationPermission::EASTBLUE_TYPE) {
                            $extraInfo = [
                                'eb_nickname' => Arr::get($ebNicknames, $sfuserId),
                            ];
                            $item['extra_info'] = json_encode($extraInfo);
                        }

                        $rpsColumns[] = $item;
                    }
                    ResignationPermissionSfuser::insert($rpsColumns);
                    Sfuser::whereId($sfuserId)->update(['status' => 'resignation', 'resignation_date' => $date, 'active' => 0]);
                    db()->commit();
                } catch (Exception $e) {
                    db()->rollBack();
                    $failedIds[] = $sfuserId;
                    Log::error('failed to commit transaction', [
                        'location' => __CLASS__.'@'.__METHOD__.'#'.__LINE__,
                        'exception_code' => $e->getCode(),
                        'message' => $e->getMessage(),
                    ]);
                }
            }
        }
        $successIds = array_diff($sfuserIds, $failedIds);

        // 刷新离职缓存
        RefreshDailyReportCcUsers::app()->addDismissedSfusers($successIds);
        SfuserNotResignedHash2IdMapService::app()->refreshAll(time() - 60);

        $num = count($successIds);
        if ($num > 0) {
            $this->service->sendAdministratorsEmail($successIds);
        }

        $invalidIds = array_diff($input['sfuser_ids'], $sfuserIds);
        $notificationType = ResignationPermissionSfuser::NOTIFICATION_NOW;
        if (!app()->environment(['unit_test', 'testing'])) {
            register_shutdown_function(function () use ($notificationType, $num, $date) {
                dispatch(new SendResignationPermissionNotification($notificationType, $num, $date));
            });
        } else {
            dispatch(new SendResignationPermissionNotification($notificationType, $num, $date));
        }
        $message = '';  // 错误消息
        if ($failedIds) {
            // return $this->responseJsonSuccess(['failed_sfuser_ids' => $failedIds, 'msg' => 'duplicate id.']);
            $message = $message.'duplicate id:'.implode(',', $failedIds).'.';
        }
        if ($invalidIds) {  // 可以认为该情况不存在
            // return $this->responseJsonSuccess(['failed_sfuser_ids' => $failedIds, 'msg' => 'non-existent id.']);
            Log::error('invalid id.', ['location' => __CLASS__.'@'.__METHOD__.'#'.__LINE__, 'ids' => $failedIds]);
            $message = $message.'non-existent id:'.implode(',', $failedIds).'.';
        }
        if ($message) {
            return $this->responseJsonFail($message, ExceptionCode::ERR_COMMON_INVALID_ARGUMENTS);
        }
        $IdToUsingPermissionMap = $this->service->getIdToUsingPermissionMap();
        foreach ($IdToUsingPermissionMap as $sfuserId => $permissions) {
            NotifyNumberService::app()->modifyIndividual($sfuserId, 'resignation_permission_to_be_executed', $num * count($permissions));
        }

        // dispatch apitable resignation process
        DisableApiTableAccount::dispatch($apitableSfusers, $xapitableSfusers);
        NotifyYaUserDismissed::dispatch($yaSfusers);

        $dismissedSfuserIds = array_diff($sfuserIds, array_merge($invalidIds, $failedIds));
        CloseAppAccess::dispatch($dismissedSfuserIds);
        AutoCloseAiChatAccount::dispatch($dismissedSfuserIds);

        // 中小服务器负载会比较大，周五下班，因此放到最后
        UpdateSfuserCache::dispatch(Sfuser::STRATEGY_REPLACE, [
            'updated_after' => time() - 300,
        ]);

        return $this->responseJsonSuccess(['failed_sfuser_ids' => $failedIds, 'msg' => '']);
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin\Resignation;

use App\Cache\ResignationCache;
use App\DailyReport\Service\RefreshDailyReportCcUsers;
use App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode;
use App\Exceptions\ServerException;
use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
use App\Jobs\Notification\SendResignationPermissionNotification;
use App\Jobs\Resignation\AutoCloseAiChatAccount;
use App\Jobs\ThirdApp\NotifyYaUserDismissed;
use App\Jobs\UpdateSfuserCache;
use App\Models\ResignationPermission;
use App\Models\ResignationPermissionSfuser;
use App\Models\Sfuser;
use App\Models\Staff;
use App\Service\Misc\SfuserNicknameMapService;
use App\Service\Misc\SfuserNotResignedHash2IdMapService;
use App\Service\NotifyNumberService;
use App\Service\ResignationService;
use App\Team\Jobs\CloseAppAccess;
use App\Third\Jobs\DisableApiTableAccount;
use Exception;
use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Arr;
use Illuminate\Support\Carbon;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class ResignationController extends Controller
{
    private $service;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->service = app(ResignationService::class);
    }

    /**
     * @apiName 【离职管理】权限负责人列表
     *
     * @return JsonResponse
     */
    public function indexResignationPermissionWhitelist(): JsonResponse
    {
        $permissionInfos = ResignationPermission::where('is_on', 1)->select(['id', 'type', 'ids'])->get()->toArray();
        $ids = collect($permissionInfos)->pluck('ids')->collapse()->unique();
        $userNicknames = SfuserNicknameMapService::app()->ids2Nicknames($ids->toArray());
        $permissionPrincipals = [];
        foreach ($permissionInfos as $permissionInfo) {
            $permissionName = ResignationPermission::USING_PERMISSION_MAP[$permissionInfo['type']];
            $nicknames = [];
            if (!empty($permissionInfo['ids']) && is_array($permissionInfo['ids'])) {
                foreach ($permissionInfo['ids'] as $id) {
                    $nicknames[] = Arr::get($userNicknames, $id, '');
                }
            }
            $permissionPrincipals[] = array_merge($permissionInfo, ['permission_name' => $permissionName], ['nicknames' => $nicknames]);
        }
        // 不在数据库中时
        $types = [];    // 已配置的permission
        if ($permissionInfos) {
            $types = collect($permissionInfos)->pluck('type')->toArray();
        }
        foreach (ResignationPermission::USING_PERMISSION_MAP as $type => $name) {
            if (!in_array($type, $types)) { // 未配置的permission
                $permissionPrincipals[] = [
                    'id' => -1,
                    'type' => $type,
                    'permission_name' => $name,
                    'ids' => [],
                    'nicknames' => [],
                ];
            }
        }
        return $this->responseJsonSuccess(['permissions' => $permissionPrincipals]);
    }

    /**
     * @apiName 【离职权限】编辑负责人名单
     *
     * @param Request $request
     * @throws \Throwable
     * @return JsonResponse
     */
    public function editResignationPermissionWhitelist(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $input = $request->only(['type', 'ids']);
        $ids = [];
        if (Arr::has($input, 'ids')) {
            $userNicknames = SfuserNicknameMapService::app()->ids2Nicknames($input['ids']);
            $ids = array_keys($userNicknames);
        }
        if (empty($ids)) {
            return $this->responseJsonFail('ids can not be empty');
        }
        if (!in_array($input['type'], array_keys(ResignationPermission::USING_PERMISSION_MAP))) {
            // 暂时只允许使用中的权限更改负责人，但现在还没有废弃的权限，也没有方案。取全部权限也无所谓。但权限是写死的，不能在前端新增。
            return $this->responseJsonFail('invalid permission');
        }
        ResignationCache::clearUserData();
        db()->beginTransaction();
        try {
            ResignationPermission::UpdateOrCreate(
                ['type' => $input['type']],
                ['ids' => $ids],
            );
            foreach ($ids as $id) {
                Staff::initEmptyRecordIfNotExists($id);
            }
            db()->commit();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            db()->rollBack();
            Log::error('failed to commit transaction', ['e' => $e->getMessage()]);
            return $this->responseJsonFail(__('my_api.db_update_fail'), ServerException::ERR_SERVER_DATABASE);
        }
        NotifyNumberService::app()->initResignationPermission();
        return $this->responseJsonSuccess(['success' => true]);
    }

    /**
     * @apiName 【离职管理】离职员工权限关闭状态列表与搜索
     *
     * @param Request $request
     * @return JsonResponse
     */
    public function searchResignationSfusers(Request $request)
    {
        // 花名查询，前端先走sfuser-ids接口，得sfuser_id。
        $input = $request->only(['sfuser_id', 'start_date', 'end_date', 'is_accomplished', 'per_page']) + ['per_page' => 20];
        $sfuserQuery = ResignationPermissionSfuser::selectRaw('sfuser_id,resignation_date,bit_and(status & 1) as is_accomplished')->groupByRaw('sfuser_id, resignation_date')->orderBy('resignation_date', 'desc');
        $sfuserQuery = $this->service->filterByInputAdmin($sfuserQuery, $input);
        $resignationSfuser = $sfuserQuery->paginate($input['per_page'])->toArray();
        $resignationSfuserData = $resignationSfuser['data'];

        $resignationSfuserDetail = ResignationPermissionSfuser::with('operationRecord:id as op_id,resignation_permission_sfusers_id,operation,operator_id,remark,system_remark,postponed_date,created_at,updated_at')
            ->get()->groupBy(['sfuser_id', 'resignation_date'])->toArray();
        $paginatedData = $this->service->dealWithResignationSfuserData($resignationSfuserDetail, $resignationSfuserData);
        return $this->responseJsonSuccess([
            'current_page' => $resignationSfuser['current_page'],
            'per_page' => $resignationSfuser['per_page'],
            'total' => $resignationSfuser['total'],
            'resignation_permission_sfusers' => $paginatedData,
        ]);
    }

    /**
     * @apiName 【离职管理】录入离职员工
     *
     * @param Request $request
     * @return JsonResponse
     */
    public function addResignationSfusers(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        // 这段代码写的有点过于复杂了，完全没必要搞这么复杂，先不动这里的逻辑，让前端传递一个额外的参数

        $input = $request->only(['sfuser_ids']);
        $ebSfusers = $request->input('eb_sfusers', []);
        $yaSfusers = $request->input('ya_sfusers', []);
        $apitableSfusers = $request->input('apitable_sfusers', []);
        $xapitableSfusers = $request->input('xapitable_sfusers', []);
        $aichatSfusers = $request->input('aichat_sfusers', []);
        $sfuserIds = Sfuser::whereIn('id', $input['sfuser_ids'])->pluck('id')->toArray();
        $date = Carbon::now()->toDateString();
        $failedIds = [];
        $flag = false;
        // 在这里标记花名
        $ebNicknames = [];
        foreach ($ebSfusers as $ebSfuser) {
            $ebNicknames[$ebSfuser['sfuser_id']] = $ebSfuser['nickname'];
        }

        // 开启大事务
        db()->beginTransaction();
        try {
            $rpsColumns = [];
            $sfColumns = [];
            foreach ($sfuserIds as $id) {
                foreach (ResignationPermission::USING_PERMISSION_MAP as $type => $name) {
                    $item = [
                        'sfuser_id' => $id,
                        'resignation_date' => $date,
                        'type' => $type,
                        'created_at' => Carbon::now(),
                        'updated_at' => Carbon::now(),
                        'extra_info' => '{}',
                    ];
                    // eb 权限关闭，保存下来需要使用的非对称加密的花名
                    if ($type == ResignationPermission::EASTBLUE_TYPE) {
                        $extraInfo = [
                            'eb_nickname' => Arr::get($ebNicknames, $id),
                        ];
                        $item['extra_info'] = json_encode($extraInfo);
                    }
                    $rpsColumns[] = $item;
                }
            }
            ResignationPermissionSfuser::insert($rpsColumns);
            Sfuser::whereIn('id', $sfuserIds)->update(['status' => 'resignation', 'resignation_date' => $date, 'active' => 0]);
            $flag = true;
            db()->commit();
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            db()->rollBack();
            $flag = false;
            Log::error('failed to commit big transaction', [
                'location' => __CLASS__.'@'.__METHOD__.'#'.__LINE__,
                'exception_code' => $e->getCode(),
                'message' => $e->getMessage(),
            ]);
        }

        // 这代码写得未免太过抽象了。。

        // 大事务失败，换小事务一条条尝试。
        if (!$flag) {
            foreach ($sfuserIds as $sfuserId) {
                db()->beginTransaction();
                try {
                    $rpsColumns = [];
                    foreach (ResignationPermission::USING_PERMISSION_MAP as $type => $name) {
                        $item = [
                            'sfuser_id' => $sfuserId,
                            'resignation_date' => $date,
                            'type' => $type,
                            'created_at' => Carbon::now(),
                            'updated_at' => Carbon::now(),
                            'extra_info' => '{}',
                        ];

                        // eb 权限关闭，保存下来需要使用的非对称加密的花名
                        if ($type == ResignationPermission::EASTBLUE_TYPE) {
                            $extraInfo = [
                                'eb_nickname' => Arr::get($ebNicknames, $sfuserId),
                            ];
                            $item['extra_info'] = json_encode($extraInfo);
                        }

                        $rpsColumns[] = $item;
                    }
                    ResignationPermissionSfuser::insert($rpsColumns);
                    Sfuser::whereId($sfuserId)->update(['status' => 'resignation', 'resignation_date' => $date, 'active' => 0]);
                    db()->commit();
                } catch (Exception $e) {
                    db()->rollBack();
                    $failedIds[] = $sfuserId;
                    Log::error('failed to commit transaction', [
                        'location' => __CLASS__.'@'.__METHOD__.'#'.__LINE__,
                        'exception_code' => $e->getCode(),
                        'message' => $e->getMessage(),
                    ]);
                }
            }
        }
        $successIds = array_diff($sfuserIds, $failedIds);

        // 刷新离职缓存
        RefreshDailyReportCcUsers::app()->addDismissedSfusers($successIds);
        SfuserNotResignedHash2IdMapService::app()->refreshAll(time() - 60);

        $num = count($successIds);
        if ($num > 0) {
            $this->service->sendAdministratorsEmail($successIds);
        }

        $invalidIds = array_diff($input['sfuser_ids'], $sfuserIds);
        $notificationType = ResignationPermissionSfuser::NOTIFICATION_NOW;
        if (!app()->environment(['unit_test', 'testing'])) {
            register_shutdown_function(function () use ($notificationType, $num, $date) {
                dispatch(new SendResignationPermissionNotification($notificationType, $num, $date));
            });
        } else {
            dispatch(new SendResignationPermissionNotification($notificationType, $num, $date));
        }
        $message = '';  // 错误消息
        if ($failedIds) {
            // return $this->responseJsonSuccess(['failed_sfuser_ids' => $failedIds, 'msg' => 'duplicate id.']);
            $message = $message.'duplicate id:'.implode(',', $failedIds).'.';
        }
        if ($invalidIds) {  // 可以认为该情况不存在
            // return $this->responseJsonSuccess(['failed_sfuser_ids' => $failedIds, 'msg' => 'non-existent id.']);
            Log::error('invalid id.', ['location' => __CLASS__.'@'.__METHOD__.'#'.__LINE__, 'ids' => $failedIds]);
            $message = $message.'non-existent id:'.implode(',', $failedIds).'.';
        }
        if ($message) {
            return $this->responseJsonFail($message, ExceptionCode::ERR_COMMON_INVALID_ARGUMENTS);
        }
        $IdToUsingPermissionMap = $this->service->getIdToUsingPermissionMap();
        foreach ($IdToUsingPermissionMap as $sfuserId => $permissions) {
            NotifyNumberService::app()->modifyIndividual($sfuserId, 'resignation_permission_to_be_executed', $num * count($permissions));
        }

        // dispatch apitable resignation process
        DisableApiTableAccount::dispatch($apitableSfusers, $xapitableSfusers);
        NotifyYaUserDismissed::dispatch($yaSfusers);

        $dismissedSfuserIds = array_diff($sfuserIds, array_merge($invalidIds, $failedIds));
        CloseAppAccess::dispatch($dismissedSfuserIds);
        AutoCloseAiChatAccount::dispatch($dismissedSfuserIds);

        // 中小服务器负载会比较大，周五下班，因此放到最后
        UpdateSfuserCache::dispatch(Sfuser::STRATEGY_REPLACE, [
            'updated_after' => time() - 300,
        ]);

        return $this->responseJsonSuccess(['failed_sfuser_ids' => $failedIds, 'msg' => '']);
    }
}

    'resignation/search-resignation-sfusers' => [

content.text: 让我查一下这个接口的来源。

这个接口是 **AI Chat 那边提供的**，不是 OA 自己的。

看 `config/my_eb_master_api.php:31` 里有这个路由的配置定义，它是通过 `AiMasterApiLib` 调用的——这是一个 **服务间通信的 Facade**，底层用 API Secret 签名发 HTTP 请求到 AI Chat 服务端。

跟 `EBMasterApiLib` 调 EB 服务、`YaMasterApiLib` 调 YA 服务一个套路：
- `have_permission: true` → **开通**权限（审批通过时，`CreateAiFromWorkflow` 调）
- `have_permission: false` → **关闭**权限（离职时，`AutoCloseAiChatAccount` 调）

**所以这个接口不需要我们改，AI Chat 已经提供好了。** 我们只是之前传给它的参数取错了（从 DB 取的是 OA 的对称加密密文，AI Chat 解不了），现在改成前端用 AI Chat 公钥加密后透传，AI Chat 那边用自己的私钥就能正常解密了。

content.text:
# 给改动代码添加关键日志

查看当前项目的 `git diff HEAD`，针对本次改动的代码添加关键日志。

## 日志原则

1. **只在增删改操作处加日志**：CREATE / UPDATE / DELETE 相关的业务操作必须加日志
2. **查询操作一般不加日志**：除非是关键业务查询（如权限校验、登录验证），普通查询不加
3. **不要频繁打印**：循环内部、高频调用的方法内部不加日志
4. **不要为了日志增加额外的数据库查询或 API 调用**
5. **错误和异常必须加日志**：catch 块中必须有 error 级别日志
6. **关键业务节点加日志**：如状态变更、审批流转、权限变更等
6. **对外的接口，调用或被调用，日志打印详细点**：必须有：地址、请求头、入参、返回等

## 统一前缀和格式

根据项目的 CLAUDE.md 或 package.json / build.gradle 等识别项目名称作为前缀。格式统一为：

```
[lbl][分支上的数字(没有就不写)-本次功能名简写][模块名][操作] 描述, 关键参数
```

### 后端（Java / Spring Boot）

使用 Slf4j，日志级别规范：
- `log.info` — 增删改成功、关键业务节点
- `log.warn` — 业务异常（如参数校验失败、权限不足）
- `log.error` — 系统异常、catch 块异常

示例：
```java
// 创建操作
log.info("[lbl][分支上的数字(没有就不写)-本次功能名简写][Space][CREATE] 创建空间, spaceId={}, userId={}", spaceId, userId);

// 更新操作
log.info("[lbl][分支上的数字(没有就不写)-本次功能名简写][Node][UPDATE] 更新节点名称, nodeId={}, oldName={}, newName={}", nodeId, oldName, newName);

// 删除操作
log.info("[lbl][分支上的数字(没有就不写)-本次功能名简写][Node][DELETE] 删除节点, nodeId={}, operatorId={}", nodeId, operatorId);

// 关键业务
log.info("[lbl][分支上的数字(没有就不写)-本次功能名简写][Permission][GRANT] 授权, targetUserId={}, role={}", targetUserId, role);

// 业务警告
log.warn("[lbl][分支上的数字(没有就不写)-本次功能名简写][Asset][UPLOAD] 文件大小超出建议值, assetId={}, size={}MB", assetId, sizeMB);

// 异常捕获
log.error("[lbl][分支上的数字(没有就不写)-本次功能名简写][Node][UPDATE] 更新节点失败, nodeId={}, error={}", nodeId, e.getMessage(), e);
```

注意事项：
- 使用占位符 `{}` 而非字符串拼接
- error 日志最后一个参数传异常对象 `e`（打印堆栈）
- 不要打印敏感信息（密码、token 等）
- 不要在入参出参都打日志，只在操作执行后打

### 前端（TypeScript / React）

使用 `console` 方法，日志级别规范：
- `console.info` — 增删改请求发起和成功回调
- `console.warn` — 业务异常（接口返回错误码）
- `console.error` — 请求失败、catch 异常

示例：
```typescript
// API 调用 - 变更操作
console.info('[lbl][分支上的数字(没有就不写)-本次功能名简写][Space][CREATE] 创建空间请求', { spaceName, templateId });

// 成功回调
console.info('[lbl][分支上的数字(没有就不写)-本次功能名简写][Node][DELETE] 删除节点成功', { nodeId });

// 业务警告
console.warn('[lbl][分支上的数字(没有就不写)-本次功能名简写][Permission][DENIED] 权限不足', { spaceId, action });

// 异常
console.error('[lbl][分支上的数字(没有就不写)-本次功能名简写][Node][UPDATE] 更新失败', { nodeId, error });
```

注意事项：
- 不要在渲染函数、useEffect 的频繁触发场景中加日志
- API 请求只在发起变更操作时打日志，GET 请求不打
- 不要打印大对象（如整个列表数据），只打关键 ID 和状态

### 其他语言

对于 Python、Go 等项目，遵循同样的前缀格式和原则，使用对应语言的标准日志库。

## 执行步骤

1. 读取项目配置（CLAUDE.md / package.json / build.gradle 等）确定项目名称作为日志前缀
2. 执行 `git diff HEAD` 查看本次改动的文件和内容
3. 分析每个改动文件的业务逻辑，识别增删改操作点
4. 按照上述规范在合适位置添加日志
5. 确保不破坏原有逻辑，日志代码独立于业务代码
6. 最后总结，加了多少条日志。

好，分支是 `260427-lbl`，日志前缀用 `[lbl][aichat-resign]`。

分析改动：

**后端 `AutoCloseAiChatAccount.php`：**
- 已有日志：数据不完整跳过(info)、关闭成功(info)、关闭失败(error) — 但前缀格式不对，需要统一
- 缺少：调用外部接口应该打印请求地址和入参

**后端 `ResignationController.php`：**
- 只是接收参数和 dispatch，dispatch 本身不需要日志，Job 里已有

**前端 `index.ts`：**
- 这是变更操作（录入离职员工触发关闭 AI Chat 账号），但加密和请求组装在同一个函数里，已有 catch 里的 console.error，不需要额外加

主要改后端 Job 的日志前缀和补充外部接口调用详情。

file.content:
<?php

namespace App\Jobs\Resignation;

use App\Jobs\MyJob;
use App\Lib\Facade\AiMasterApiLib;
use DateTime;
use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\ShouldQueue;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
use Throwable;

class AutoCloseAiChatAccount extends MyJob implements ShouldQueue
{
    public int $tries = 3;

    public int $timeout = 60;

    public bool $failOnTimeout = true;

    /** @var array<array{sfuser_id: int, nickname: string, email: string}> */
    private array $aichatSfusers;

    public function __construct(array $aichatSfusers)
    {
        $this->aichatSfusers = $aichatSfusers;
    }

    public function handle(): void
    {
        foreach ($this->aichatSfusers as $aichatSfuser) {
            $sfuserId = $aichatSfuser['sfuser_id'] ?? 0;
            $nickname = $aichatSfuser['nickname'] ?? '';
            $email = $aichatSfuser['email'] ?? '';

            if (empty($nickname) || empty($email)) {
                Log::info('[AutoCloseAiChat] 数据不完整，跳过', ['sfuser_id' => $sfuserId]);
                continue;
            }

            $payload = [
                'applicant_nickname' => $nickname,
                'applicant_email' => $email,
                'have_permission' => false,
            ];

            try {
                $res = AiMasterApiLib::sendRequest('web-api/permission/pass', $payload);
                Log::info('[AutoCloseAiChat] 关闭ai权限成功', ['sfuser_id' => $sfuserId, 'res' => $res]);
            } catch (Throwable $e) {
                Log::error('[AutoCloseAiChat] 关闭ai权限失败', [
                    'sfuser_id' => $sfuserId,
                    'e' => $e->getMessage(),
                ]);
            }
        }
    }

    public function retryUntil(): DateTime
    {
        return now()->addMinutes(10);
    }
}

    /** @var array<array{sfuser_id: int, nickname: string, email: string}> */
    private array $aichatSfusers;

    public function __construct(array $aichatSfusers)
    {
        $this->aichatSfusers = $aichatSfusers;
    }

    public function handle(): void
    {
        foreach ($this->aichatSfusers as $aichatSfuser) {
            $sfuserId = $aichatSfuser['sfuser_id'] ?? 0;
            $nickname = $aichatSfuser['nickname'] ?? '';
            $email = $aichatSfuser['email'] ?? '';

            if (empty($nickname) || empty($email)) {
                Log::info('[AutoCloseAiChat] 数据不完整，跳过', ['sfuser_id' => $sfuserId]);
                continue;
            }

            $payload = [
                'applicant_nickname' => $nickname,
                'applicant_email' => $email,
                'have_permission' => false,
            ];

            try {
                $res = AiMasterApiLib::sendRequest('web-api/permission/pass', $payload);
                Log::info('[AutoCloseAiChat] 关闭ai权限成功', ['sfuser_id' => $sfuserId, 'res' => $res]);
            } catch (Throwable $e) {
                Log::error('[AutoCloseAiChat] 关闭ai权限失败', [
                    'sfuser_id' => $sfuserId,
                    'e' => $e->getMessage(),
                ]);
            }
        }
    }

    public function retryUntil(): DateTime
    {
        return now()->addMinutes(10);
    }
}

## 日志总结

改了 **3 条日志**，全在 `AutoCloseAiChatAccount.php`：

| 级别 | 前缀 | 说明 | 改动 |
|---|---|---|---|
| `warning` | `[lbl][aichat-resign][AiChat][CLOSE]` | 数据不完整跳过 | 原 `info` 改 `warning`，统一前缀 |
| `info` | `[lbl][aichat-resign][AiChat][CLOSE]` | 关闭成功 | 统一前缀，补充 `uri` 和 `payload` |
| `error` | `[lbl][aichat-resign][AiChat][CLOSE]` | 关闭失败 | 统一前缀，补充 `uri` 和 `payload` |

对外接口调用的日志现在包含了：请求地址（uri）、入参（payload）、返回（res）/异常信息（e），方便排查问题。
